Events & parties

Book the whole place out

Birthdays, team offsites, league nights, kids' parties — take over the bays for a couple of hours. We set up the machines, you bring the crew. Beginners more than welcome.

Birthday bash

Two bays, two hours, all the balls you can hit. Great for kids and grown-ups alike — we'll keep the feed gentle for first-timers.

From $180
Up to 8 guests
Most popular

Team offsite

Whole-venue buyout for up to 16. A round-robin, a little coaching, zero pressure — the easiest team hang you'll plan all quarter.

From $360
All four bays

League night

A standing weekly slot for your crew — same bay, same time, locked in for the season. We'll help you run the ladder.

Let's talk
Recurring rate
How it works

Planning one is easy

01
Tell us the basics

Date, headcount, and whether it's tennis, pickleball, or a bit of both.

02
We set the room

Bays converted, machines loaded, gear laid out — ready before your first guest arrives.

03
You just show up

Bring food and drinks if you like — there's room to gather between games.

Let's plan your event

Tell us what you're dreaming up and we'll sort the rest.
